reasoning: The fiscal year 2025 ended on September 30, 2025. According to the CBO and final U.S. Treasury data reported in October 2025, the total customs duties collected for FY 2025 were $195 billion. Since the resolution criteria strictly look at customs duties collected in FY 2025, and this figure is far below the $500 billion to $1 trillion range required by the market, there is virtually no chance the final Financial Report of the U.S. Government will revise this figure upward by over $300 billion. The market will undoubtedly resolve to NO.
